hooks.prompt:
A file in this repo was just changed by a tool. Hook input JSON: $ARGUMENTS

Extract the changed file path from tool_input.file_path. If the file is not reviewable code (skip: *.md, tasks.md, anything under decisions/ or .claude/, .env*, .gitignore, images/binary assets), reply that no review is needed and approve. Otherwise: read the review instructions in .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md and review the changed file exactly as they specify, reading related files for context where needed. Report findings in the specified format. Only block (fail) for critical findings; approve otherwise.
